source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for precise creator workflows with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, luminous headings, compact controls, and clear numeric dashboards.
layout: Precise 8px grid, slim mineral-seam dividers, opal-flash focus states, compact creator panels, asset grids, and iridescent preview surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Opal motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Morphous Opal transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated opal flash mineral motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A polished Australian opal slice from an outback seam, irregular organic stone silhouette, milky white body color with intense internal fire flashes in electric blue, blue-green, emerald, cyan, and small ember orange sparks. The mineral should look opaque and solid, not glass or liquid, with crisp edges and subtle stone texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, single opal specimen, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves iridescent color play and pearly white depth without cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff removable chroma-key background. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jewelry setting, no ring, no necklace, no hand, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no extra rocks, no blue or green background, no transparent glass look.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Opal light design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Opal" / "Opal Flash", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible iridescent creator system.
Motif reference: polished Australian opal from an outback seam, milky white base, electric blue, blue-green, emerald, cyan, ember orange flashes, warm ochre seam edge.
Canvas: 3840x2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, polished editorial UI board, no tiny unreadable text.
Palette: Opal Milk #F8FBF7, Seam Ink #182124, Flash Blue #1677FF, Fire Green #20D88F, Ember Orange #FF7A24, Cyan Gleam #60E6F2, Ochre Matrix #B7793E, Pearl Gray #DDE7E2, Deep Teal #063F4A.
Content: include palette swatches, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, creator dashboard charts, asset grid, upload/progress states, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, icons, and sample usage.
Design language: pearly white surfaces, thin dark mineral-seam dividers, subtle iridescent edge highlights, blue/green primary actions, orange warning/fire accents, translucent opal texture panels, precise 8px rhythm, 8px or smaller card radii, professional creator-tool interface.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no jewelry store branding, no stock hero page, no illegible microtext, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logo, no dark-mode board in this image.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Opal dark design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Opal" / "Opal Flash", translated from the light board as a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible iridescent creator system.
Motif reference: polished Australian opal from an outback seam, milky white fire suspended in dark mineral depth, electric blue, blue-green, emerald, cyan, ember orange flashes, warm ochre seam edge.
Canvas: 3840x2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, polished editorial UI board, no tiny unreadable text.
Palette: Night Seam #071417, Opal Milk #F8FBF7, Dark Surface #102326, Flash Blue #4D96FF, Fire Green #34E6A0, Ember Orange #FF8A34, Cyan Gleam #6FF0F2, Ochre Matrix #C98A4B, Pearl Muted #9FB4AE.
Content: include palette swatches, typography guidance for English and Japanese, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, creator dashboard charts, asset grid, upload/progress states, empty/error/loading states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture, icons, and sample usage.
Design language: deep mineral-seam background, luminous opal surfaces, thin cyan/blue-green borders, blue primary actions, green success, orange fire warnings, pearly text, subtle iridescent panel texture, precise 8px rhythm, 8px or smaller card radii, professional creator-tool interface.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no nightclub neon overload, no jewelry store branding, no stock hero page, no illegible microtext, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logo, no light-mode board in this image.
